indicators.name: Dining tables
indicators.rationale: Multiple dining tables provide ample seating for multiple people.

indicators.name: Chairs
indicators.rationale: Comfortable chairs around each table for casual seating.

indicators.name: Potted plants
indicators.rationale: Adding greenery can make the space feel more inviting and relaxed.

indicators.name: Lighting
indicators.rationale: Soft lighting creates a warm and welcoming atmosphere.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for casual conversations and hangouts due to its ample seating, comfortable chairs, and inviting lighting.
